kernel_source: __kernel void tiny_write(__global int* out) { int i = get_global_id(0); out[i] = i * 42; }

spirv_analysis.note: SPIR-V contains 4 OpStore instructions confirming write path exists in shader source representation

conclusion: Shader has write path (OpStore present). Failure is NOT in shader compilation. Root cause is post-compilation: command stream emission, buffer descriptor binding, IOVA mapping, or cache visibility.
risk: shader compiles with stores; failure is in command/binding/memory layer
